cedict_en: to make/to build/to manufacture/to invent/to fabricate/to go to/party (in a lawsuit or legal agreement)/crop/classifier for crops
to go forward/to forge ahead/to advance/onward
surname Huan/ring/hoop/loop/(chain) link/classifier for scores in archery etc/to surround/to encircle/to hem in
to withdraw/to abort/to quit/to log out (computing)
(name of states and dynasties at several different periods)/surname Qi/neat/even/level with/identical/simultaneous/all together/to even sth out
surname Wei/to encircle/to surround/all around/to wear by wrapping around (scarf, shawl)
surname Fu/abbr. for Fujian province 福建省[Fu2 jian4 Sheng3]/good fortune/happiness/luck
to repair/to patch/to mend/to make up for/to fill (a vacancy)/to supplement
